## Summary

Explain the visitor or maintainer problem and the change in a few sentences.

## Behavior

- Describe user-visible content, navigation, analytics, or deployment effects.
- Call out responsive, accessibility, SEO, and performance impacts.

## Verification

List the checks you ran and their results. Include the relevant desktop and
mobile viewport checks for visual changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and uses the existing site patterns.
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run build` pass.
- [ ] Meaningful images have alt text and interactive controls are keyboard-operable.
- [ ] No API keys, Cloudflare secrets, or analytics credentials are included.
- [ ] Documentation or deployment guidance was updated when needed.
